vocab.meaning: một kho tàng thông tin cực kỳ hữu ích
vocab.example: I find the National Geographic website to be a mine of information for anyone interested in wildlife and environmental conservation.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được cách làm gì đó/học cách sử dụng
vocab.example: I often visit YouTube tutorials because they help me get the hang of complex software like Photoshop in no time.
I habitually browse international news portals to broaden my horizons and understand different cultural perspectives.

vocab.word: at the touch of a button
vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức (thông qua thao tác máy tính)
vocab.example: The beauty of e-commerce sites is that I can order groceries or electronics at the touch of a button without leaving my house.

vocab.meaning: thế giới nằm trong tay bạn (có vô số cơ hội)
vocab.example: With educational websites offering free courses, the world is your oyster if you have the discipline to study independently.
When I start scrolling through Pinterest for home decor ideas, I often lose track of time and spend hours on the site.

vocab.word: keep one's finger on the pulse
vocab.meaning: luôn cập nhật những xu hướng mới nhất
vocab.example: I visit fashion and design blogs daily to keep my finger on the pulse of the ever-changing creative industry.

vocab.word: on the tip of one's tongue
vocab.meaning: sắp nhớ ra (dùng khi nói về việc tra cứu thông tin)
vocab.example: Whenever a fact is on the tip of my tongue, I immediately head to Google to find the answer within seconds.

vocab.meaning: tốn rất nhiều tiền (dùng khi nói về web mua sắm đồ hiệu)
vocab.example: I enjoy window shopping on high-end fashion sites, even though most of the items there would cost a pretty penny.

vocab.meaning: mới nhất, mang tính cập nhật từng phút
vocab.example: I rely on Twitter for up-to-the-minute reports on breaking news and live global events.
